info.title: SkillSutra

post.description: Instantly lock down a specific compromised account.

THE KILL SWITCH.
Use only in the event of a catastrophic, system-wide data leak.
This purges all Redis sessions, logging all users out instantly without dropping websockets.

get.description: Fetches the dynamic, 3-level permission-aware navigation tree for the current user.

Zero-Trust WebSockets: 
Instead of sending JWTs over WSS, we generate a short-lived (10s) 
single-use ticket in Redis that the client uses to establish the WS connection.

Standard Enterprise API Response format.
Every endpoint across the platform MUST return this structure.
